item.dc:creator: loadingartist

item.title: I’m dating for the first time in my 30s
item.description: Hello usersub! I am a 37 year old man who spent his whole adult life thinking he didn’t want or need a girlfriend or wife. Instead, friends could fill my social needs, and there was ol’ righty for other things. Circumstances conspired for me to meet a new male bisexual friend, who I soon developed a crush on. This led to a lot of soul searching and experimentation, in which I realized that I was gay. No, I also don’t know how I got this far without realizing it. Though my new friend did not reciprocate my crush (amicably, thankfully), I soon started dating and soon found a boyfriend who I am genuinely attracted to, and vice-versa. We’ve been together for about 2 months now, so we’re still in the honeymoon phase, but we’ve hit a few rough patches that we worked through together, making our relationship stronger in the process. Thank you for reading this, I just wanted to put this in the world to confirm that it’s real and I’m not dreaming. Have a good one! Edit: wow, was not expecting to hit front page with this. Thank you everyone for your kinds words!
item.dc:creator: pkmnfrk1

item.title: What is a legacy?
item.description: I ran across this comment in the midst of an incredibly depressing collection of people whining about how Millennials complain too much. I want to leave my children a better world. But I don’t know how I can if I have to keep struggling just to survive.

item.title: Bottom shelf employeed skibidi toilet memes
item.description:
Do you collect Imgur notifications? Well, have I got news for you! You no longer have to wait for the posts to hit "most viral" to be notified. Now, you can be notified as soon as I post, so you can catch the steaming hot shitposts fresh out the skibidi toilet, or whatever. The way god intended.
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
Join for the games. Shit, man. We play everything...if there's a specific game you like, I guarantee you'll find a shitposting meme loving degen there to play it with you. Join for the memes. We share memes in the meme dumpster 24/7 Join for the NSFW memes. Join to ping @humlyhums Join to meet @crimebrulee the biggest problem in the server. discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka
You made us drink Enchilada soda. >:( twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka Come heckle us. Follow the channel to be notified when we go live.
Throwback to a baby Taxi Bear snuggling with old man Nutterbutt for adorable #sleeperagent tax
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka

item.title: Remember Azovstal?This dude defended it, then refused to become POW, stayed at Azovstal, hid from russians, and then he went on foot for 200 kms undercover to get out of russian occupation.He did it.Fucking legend. I am speechless.

item.description: My boy, Felix, passed away this morning. I will miss you dearly, thank you for everything ❤️
item.dc:creator: Midanyan

item.title: Jasmine is out of surgery!!
item.description:
Got this pic from the foster coordinator at the shelter. Jasmine is out of surgery and it went well! Look at that little baby. Such a trooper
She’s gonna get some good pain meds, and I am not planning on going anywhere tonight so she’ll have a warm lap to snooze and recover on. I can’t wait to go pick her up!! (Update #1: https://imgur.com/gallery/FCrBTuw ) (Update #2: https://imgur.com/gallery/1h76Fy9 )
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays

item.title: It's hot out there. Stay cool.
item.dc:creator: roaduardo

item.title: Bisky the Brainless
item.description:
This is my boy, Biscuit Dough, or bisky for short
He may be kind of odd
But he proofs a mean loaf
Is ever vigilant for bugs in the windows
Sometimes his dough gets over proofed
But despite his thoughtless stare
I have never once doubted that this cat loves me
And I love him too
item.dc:creator: lizzlemcbizzle
